title: DNS Zone
description: Manual DNS records for a Cloudflare-managed zone. Auto-generated records (servers, services, wildcards, ACME delegation) are not defined here.

name.description: Domain name of the Cloudflare zone (e.g. 'excloo.net'). Must match a zone in the Cloudflare account.

records.description: Manual DNS records to create in this zone. These are merged with the dns defaults (ttl, proxied, priority) before being applied.

content.description: Record value. For A records: an IPv4 address. For AAAA: an IPv6 address. For CNAME/MX/NS: a hostname. For TXT: a quoted string.

id.description: Stable identifier for records that share the same type and name. Changing this value recreates the Terraform resource address.

name.description: DNS record name relative to the zone (e.g. 'www', 'mail'). Use '@' for the zone apex.

priority.description: Record priority. Required for MX and SRV records; ignored for other types.

proxied.description: Whether to proxy this record through Cloudflare. Overrides the dns default. Cannot be used with TXT, MX, or NS records.

ttl.description: TTL in seconds. Overrides the dns default. Use 1 for Cloudflare's automatic TTL (only valid when proxied is false).

wildcard.description: Also create a wildcard CNAME (*.name → name) for this record. Overrides the dns default. Only applies to A, AAAA, and CNAME records.
